message:
fix(time): disarm deadline on timeout error path, fix interval re-arm encapsulation

Three fixes in the sleep/interval timer subsystem:

1. asx_timeout_poll: Disarm deadline timer when inner poll returns
   an error (not just on success). Previously the timer leaked on
   the error path, staying registered in the timer wheel.

2. asx_interval_poll max_ticks: Disarm deadline when interval
   reaches max_ticks and returns ASX_OK. Previously leaked timer.

3. asx_interval_poll re-arm: Replace direct deadline struct field
   manipulation (s->deadline.expired = 0, etc.) with proper API
   calls (disarm → init → arm). This respects the deadline
   abstraction boundary and prevents breakage if the deadline
   module's internals change. Overflow check happens before
   disarm so deadline state is preserved on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
